title: michelia formosana
intro: Michelia formosana, also known as Taiwan magnolia or Formosan Michelia, is a species of flowering plant in the magnolia family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Michelia formosana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Michelia formosana is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions.
